The '''Firestar 10-K''' was a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] weapon. Oddly, it was once found in the stomach of a creature known as [[Steelhoof|SteelClaw]] in the [[Dead Forest (Kashyyyk)|Dead Forest]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. After the Firestar 10-K was found, they went through mass production.

According to Boba Fett, the weapon has a good balance of firepower, accuracy, and weight.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' uses the same 3D model to represent the Firestar 10-K and the [[Dart carbine]].
